case_title: WILLIAMS, DEMPSEY P92058 VS SPRINT COMMUNICATIONS COMPANY L.P.

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT SENT TO SPRINT COMMUNICATIONS COMPANY LP RETURNED--FORWARD ORDER EXPIRED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS, DEMPSEY P92058 RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SPRINT COMMUNICATIONS COMPANY L.P. $42.78 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $42.78, MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT WAS GRANTED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
